name: Worcester Broiled Halibut Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange fish on rack in broiler pan; set aside.
2. Combine orange juice and orange peel, Worcestershire sauce, and salt in a small bowl.
3. Brush mixture lightly over the fish.
4. Dot with butter.
5. Place under pre-heated hot broiler for 10 to 12 minutes, or until fish flakes when tested with a fork, basting occasionally with remaining Worcestershire mixture.
SOURCE: Lea & Perrins Worcestershire Sauce Advertisement in the February, 1973 issue of Southern Living Magazine. Typed for you by Nancy Coleman.
